title: Shikshan Mantra OS Vendor Manifest
description: Canonical schema for vendor/MANIFEST.yml. Lists upstream third-party projects pinned by SHA, with SPDX license attribution and integration targets. Per ADR-0003 (docs/adr/0003-vendor-strategy.md).

version.description: Schema version; pinned to 1 until a superseding ADR ships.

upstream_url.description: Upstream clone URL; must use http, https, or git scheme.

pinned_commit.description: Full 40-character lowercase hex SHA-1 commit pin.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0-or-later, CC-BY-SA-4.0). Optional 'WITH <exception>' clause permitted.

items.description: Repo-relative POSIX path (no leading slash, no backslashes, no '..' segments).

integration_targets.description: Repo-relative POSIX paths the upstream content is copied to. Empty array allowed for manifest entries that are pinned but not yet integrated. Note: an accompanying validator (scripts/dev/vendor-sync.py per SMO-0104) rejects entries that fall under policies/protected-paths.yml deny: globs.

last_synced.description: ISO-8601 date-time of the last successful local sync against pinned_commit.

reviewer_team.description: GitHub team slug responsible for reviewing pin updates for this upstream.

purpose.description: Optional human-readable note on why this upstream is vendored.

tree_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 over the canonical tree manifest of the copied subset.
